base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_bomb — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Bomb pickup — drops from enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bomb pickup — drops from enemies; adds to inventory (max 4-8-12-16)
